attraction_name: Hangzhou Hubin Intime in77 Zone A
description: A well-known shopping center in Hangzhou, located by West Lake, offering a complete range of brands and convenient transportation.
The top attraction among the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a causeway built under the supervision of Su Dongpo, most famous for its willow trees in spring.
A large musical fountain located in Lakeside Third Park, offering a spectacular nighttime performance synchronized with music.
China's first national wetland park, boasting beautiful ecological environments and a filming location for 'If You Are the One.'
A historical and cultural pedestrian street in Hangzhou, preserving the street layout from the Southern Song Dynasty, ideal for strolling.

attraction_name: China Knife, Scissors, and Sword Museum
description: A specialized museum showcasing the craftsmanship of Chinese knives, scissors, and swords, providing insights into Hangzhou's traditional handicraft culture.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, located on Xiaoyingzhou Island, named after the reflection of three stone pagodas resembling moons.
The most representative historical and cultural district in Hangzhou, retaining Ming and Qing architectural styles, with a variety of unique boutique shops.

attraction_name: China Academy of Art Xiangshan Campus
description: A renowned art academy with distinctive architectural design, ideal for art enthusiasts to visit.
A well-preserved historical district featuring typical Jiangnan water town architecture, rich in local life and atmosphere.
